description: Trigger a Monte Carlo custom rule or monitor run and surface results as a Dagster asset check.

asset_key.label: Asset Key
asset_key.description: Asset key to attach this check to

mcd_id_env_var.label: Mcd Id Env Var
mcd_id_env_var.description: Env var with Monte Carlo API key ID

mcd_token_env_var.label: Mcd Token Env Var
mcd_token_env_var.description: Env var with Monte Carlo API token

rule_uuid.label: Rule Uuid
rule_uuid.description: UUID of the Monte Carlo Custom SQL Rule to execute.

timeout_seconds.label: Timeout Seconds
timeout_seconds.description: Max seconds to wait for rule execution
